title: TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
friendlyTitle: A local memory system for AI agents
summary: TencentDB Agent Memory is a fast-trending TypeScript and Python project for local long-term memory in AI agents. The repository describes a four-tier progressive memory pipeline with no external API dependency, and GitHub currently shows about 7.1k stars and 673 forks.
friendlySummary: TencentDB Agent Memory helps AI agents keep long-term memory locally instead of depending on outside APIs.
whyItMatters: Builders can study or adapt it when they need agent memory that stays local, separates short-term and long-term context, and avoids sending memory operations to third-party services.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it if you are building an agent that needs to remember useful information while keeping more control over where that memory lives.
